data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the integration with onboarding workflows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the integration with onboarding workflows, but the provided evidence does not include any specific information or functionality that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for integration with onboarding workflows, yet there is no evidence demonstrating that this feature is implemented or operational. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of integration with onboarding workflows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the integration with onboarding workflows.
